question: The chart shows the distribution of energy use by source. Based on this data, which of the following conclusions can be made?

options.A: Other accounts for slightly less than half of total energy use.
options.B: Hydroelectric is the smallest category by percentage.
options.C: Fossil Fuels make up more than one quarter of the total energy use.
options.D: Renewables and Fossil Fuels together make up more than two thirds of the total.

explanation: This pie chart uses dual encoding: slice angle represents percentage, and the radius also varies with percentage, so slice area differences are exaggerated. That can make the largest category look overly dominant. Other: 45%; Fossil Fuels: 22%; Renewables: 18%; Hydroelectric: 15%.
